toolChanges.reason: ESLint 9 and Prettier are used for local linting and formatting; Biome is redundant and produced 69 style/correctness warnings.
Enabled to scan JSON configuration files for syntax and key duplication errors.
Enabled to analyze GitHub Action workflows and infra-as-code configurations for security issues.
Enabled to detect code smell and duplicate code issues.

patternChanges.reason: Noisy security pattern flagging caret (^) version ranges in package.json dependencies.

recommendedPathsToIgnore.reason: Legacy service worker file containing non-literal RegExp and console.error warnings. The file is already deleted in the workspace and will be resolved on Codacy once the branch is merged.

keyImprovements: Redundant Biome tool disabled, cutting 69 low-value formatting and unused variables issues.
Noisy package-dependencies-check Semgrep pattern disabled, resolving 23 false-positive warnings in package.json.
High-signal security tools (Checkov, PMD 7) enabled to ensure workflow and dependency security.
Tuned pattern list to decrease total issues from 102 to 5 (all 5 remaining issues reside in the legacy public/sw.js file which is already deleted on the local branch).
